features: ADVANCED CLEANSING SOLUTION: Utilizes liposomal technology to effectively remove both water-soluble and oil-soluble impurities, unlike traditional micellar waters
TARGETS DARK SPOTS & DULLNESS: Formulated to combat skin spots and restore luminosity to dull skin
RESTORES SKIN BARRIER: Supplies essential fatty acids, restoring lipid balance and strengthening the water-lipid barrier
EVENS SKIN TONE: Helps clarify and even out skin tone, promoting a radiant complexion
description: Product Description Sensyses Cleanser Lightening is a next-generation cleansing solution designed to address dull skin and dark spots. The formulation is enriched with essential fatty acids that restore the skin's lipid balance and strengthen the water-lipid barrier. Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Ingredients Water, penyl glycol, glycerin, potassium, azeloyl dyglycinate, licorice (glycyrriza glabra) root extract, ascorbyl glycoside, propylene glycol, lecithin, alcohol, diodium cocohomodiacetate, DISODIO EDTTO A, polysorbate 20, sodium hydroxide, sodium chloride, potassium sorbate O. Benzoat Natrium, phenoxyethanol, fragrance, red D&C no. Pack of 33 Directions Apply Sensyses Cleanser Lightening to a cotton pad and gently wipe over the face, neck, and décolletage. No rinsing required. Use daily, both morning and evening, as part of your skincare routine. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children. See more
